description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a boxy, minimalist design and large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides. The exterior is primarily dark, likely finished with smooth concrete or painted stucco, and features a rooftop terrace with glass railings and skylights. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with landscaped greenery and several trees providing a suburban or urban residential feel. The front facade includes a prominent garage door and a main entrance with a small overhang and adjacent windows. The rear of the house features a patio area with outdoor furniture and a pergola, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The overall structure is single-story, with clean lines and an emphasis on open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of paved and landscaped surroundings. The design emphasizes minimalism, open spaces, and indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, paved driveway, and a tree-lined approach.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the patio area, pergola, and more private landscaping with trees.
description_view_2: Side view with large windows, visible rooftop terrace, and a clear look at the patio and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expanse of the flat roof, glass railings, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, large glass door, adjacent windows, and a paved approach
